item.title: Version 26.07.13
item.description:
What's New in 26.07.13

  • Tmux reliability: The global palette and main tab now reliably list your sessions in the notarized app (forced socket path + safer process I/O). Empty-state messages surface real errors.

26.07.13 更新内容

  • Tmux 可靠性：公证版 App 里全局面板与主 tab 现在能稳定列出 session（强制 socket 路径 + 更稳妥的进程 IO）；空状态会显示真实错误信息。

What's New in 26.07.12

  • New tool — Tmux: Browse all sessions, windows and panes in a tree. Jump with one click, drag windows across sessions, and open a global hotkey palette (⌃⌥⌘T) from anywhere — even with the main window closed.

26.07.12 更新内容

  • 新工具 · Tmux：以树形浏览全部 session / window / pane，一点跳转、拖拽跨 session 移动 window；支持全局快捷键（⌃⌥⌘T）随时弹出独立面板，主窗口关掉也能用。

What's New in 26.07.11

  • New — Screenshot Text (OCR): Press ⌘⇧S, drag a box over anything on screen — an image, a video frame, text you can't select — and its text is recognized on your Mac, copied to the clipboard, and popped into the action capsule.
  • New tool — Process Insight: See what's running with live CPU/memory metrics and code-signing facts, plus a one-tap AI explanation of what any process actually is.
  • New tool — Now Playing: See at a glance which apps are currently playing audio.
  • New tool — Naga side buttons: Remap the side buttons of a Razer Naga to keyboard shortcuts.
  • Dashboard additions: A Now Playing card, battery charge & health rings, and a combined Memory + Swap card.
  • Menu bar & polish: Left-click opens the window directly, right-click shows the menu — plus assorted fixes.

26.07.11 更新内容

  • 新功能 · 截图取词 (OCR)：按 ⌘⇧S，在屏幕上框选任意区域——图片、视频画面、选不中的文字——即可在本机识别其中文字，自动复制到剪贴板并弹出动作胶囊。
  • 新工具 · 进程洞察：查看正在运行的进程，含实时 CPU / 内存指标与代码签名信息，还能一键让 AI 解释「这个进程到底是什么」。
  • 新工具 · Now Playing：一眼看清当前哪些 app 正在播放音频。
  • 新工具 · Naga 侧键：把 Razer Naga 的侧键重映射为键盘快捷键。
  • 仪表盘新增：Now Playing 卡片、电池充电与健康环、内存 + Swap 合并卡片。
  • 菜单栏与打磨：左键直接打开窗口，右键显示菜单，另含若干修复。

What's New in 26.07.10

  • Fixes app launch: Earlier 26.07.x builds could fail to open after download (“the application cannot be opened”). This is now fully resolved and the app launches normally.
  • Web Preview, refreshed: The pop-up mini-browser has a single slim glass toolbar — back, forward and reload on the left, the page title in the middle, and copy-link and open-in-browser on the right.
  • Tidier result window: Short AI results no longer show a needless scrollbar.

26.07.10 更新内容

  • 修复无法打开：此前 26.07.x 下载后可能打不开(“应用程序无法打开”),现已彻底解决,可正常启动。
  • 网页预览焕新：弹出的迷你浏览器换成一条纤薄的玻璃工具栏——后退 / 前进 / 刷新在左，页面标题居中，复制链接与用浏览器打开靠右。
  • 结果窗口更整洁：短的 AI 结果不再显示多余的滚动条。

What's New in 26.07.9

  • Fixes a launch failure: The downloaded app could fail to open (“the application cannot be opened”). It now launches normally.
  • Web Preview, refreshed: The pop-up mini-browser now has a single slim glass toolbar — back, forward and reload on the left, the page title in the middle, and copy-link and open-in-browser on the right.

26.07.9 更新内容

  • 修复无法打开：下载后的 app 可能打不开(“应用程序无法打开”),现已恢复正常启动。
  • 网页预览焕新：弹出的迷你浏览器换成一条纤薄的玻璃工具栏——后退 / 前进 / 刷新在左，页面标题居中，复制链接与用浏览器打开靠右。

What's New in 26.07.8

  • Web Preview, refreshed: The pop-up mini-browser now has a single slim glass toolbar — back, forward and reload on the left, the page title in the middle, and copy-link and open-in-browser on the right. Cleaner, with more of the page in view.

26.07.8 更新内容

  • 网页预览焕新：弹出的迷你浏览器换成一条纤薄的玻璃工具栏——后退 / 前进 / 刷新在左，页面标题居中，复制链接与用浏览器打开靠右；更清爽，网页可视区域更大。

What's New in 26.06.7

  • PopBar works in more apps: Selecting text in apps whose text the system can't read directly — like WeChat chat bubbles — now brings up the popup, including triple-click to grab a whole line. Your clipboard is left untouched.

26.06.7 更新内容

  • 划词胶囊支持更多 App：在系统读不到文字的 App（如微信聊天气泡）里选中文字，现在也能弹出操作菜单，三击选整句同样可用；全程不改动你的剪贴板。

What's New in 26.06.6

  • PopBar, three looks: Choose how the action popup appears — the classic capsule bar, a radial Wheel centered on your cursor, or a bright Liquid Glass ring. Resize the ring and show or hide its icons and labels, with a live preview right beside the settings as you adjust.
  • Works in more apps: PopBar now picks up selections in copy-on-select terminals, so it triggers where it couldn't before.
  • AI Models settings: A dedicated page for your provider, model and key — shared across the app, with an optional per-action model override.
  • Fixes: The settings window now reliably opens in front instead of hiding behind other apps, and taps on the Liquid Glass wheel always register.

26.06.6 更新内容

  • 划词胶囊 · 三种样式：动作弹窗可选三种外观——经典胶囊条、以光标为圆心的环形轮盘、明亮的水玻璃圆环；还能调整圆环大小、显示或隐藏图标与文字，调节时设置窗口旁有实时预览。
  • 更多 App 可用：现在也能读取"选中即复制"类终端里的选区，以前触发不了的地方也能用了。
  • AI 模型设置页：独立页面统一管理 provider、模型与密钥，全 App 共用，并可为单个动作单独指定模型。
  • 修复：从菜单栏打开设置窗口现在稳定显示在最前，不再被其它 App 盖住；水玻璃轮盘的点击也能稳定响应。

What's New in 26.06.5

  • New tool — PopBar: Select text in any app and a little capsule of actions pops up right at your cursor. Pick one and the AI answer streams in live, formatted as rich text (headings, lists, code).
  • Your own actions: Add, edit, and reorder actions — each can use its own model. Bring your own provider key (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Doubao, Qwen, Ollama).
  • Comfortable windows: Drag a result anywhere, let it grow to fit long answers, dial the text size to taste, and pin several results open side by side.

26.06.5 更新内容

  • 新增工具 · 划词胶囊 PopBar:在任意 App 里选中文字,光标旁就会弹出一排操作胶囊。点一下,AI 回答就实时流式显示,并按富文本渲染(标题、列表、代码)。
  • 动作随你定:可添加、编辑、排序动作,每个动作可单独选模型;自带 provider 密钥(DeepSeek、OpenAI、豆包、通义千问、Ollama)。
  • 窗口更顺手:结果窗口可拖动、可随内容自动变高、可调字号,还能同时固定多个结果并排查看。

What's New in 26.06.4

  • New tool — Memory: See memory pressure at a glance, plus a stacked bar showing how your RAM is split up (Wired / App / Compressed / Cached / Free) and Swap on its own. Every metric has a plain-language explanation, so you don't need to know the jargon.
  • New — Dashboard: A glanceable overview that's now the landing page. Cards for Memory, Battery, Wake Locks, Ports, Disk, and Swap — each one click away from its full tool.

26.06.4 更新内容

  • 新增工具 · 内存:一眼看清内存压力,并用堆叠条展示内存是怎么分配的(锁定 / 应用 / 已压缩 / 已缓存 / 空闲),交换区单独列出。每一项指标都配了大白话解释,不用懂术语也看得明白。
  • 新增 · 概览 Dashboard:启动即见的总览页,内存、电池、唤醒占用、端口、磁盘、交换区都做成卡片,点一下就进入对应工具。
